steps.title: Use the x-intercept
steps.content: The graph models combinations of M-type and K-type stars with total mass $132{,}778$ quettagrams. At the $x$-intercept, $y=0$, so all the mass comes from M-type stars.

steps.title: Compute mass per M-type star
steps.content:
The graph shows an $x$-intercept near $160$. If each M-type star has mass $m$, then
$$160m=132{,}778$$
$$m=\frac{132{,}778}{160}=829.8625$$

steps.title: Choose the closest estimate
steps.content: The value $829.8625$ is closest to $828$ among the choices. The answer is A.
